name: wiki-article-text
description: readArticle returns the full text content of a Wikipedia article. Returns {title, extract (full text), pageid, url}. Best for long-form reading or summarization.
data_shape: {title: string, extract: string, pageid: number, url: string}

name: wiki-search-cards
description: search returns matching Wikipedia articles. Each result has {title, pageid, snippet (HTML excerpt), url}. Display as cards with title and snippet preview.
data_shape: array of {title: string, pageid: number, snippet: string, url: string}
